context: Name of the to be translated language

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
translation: Ṣe igbona ina ti ọpa rẹ
Kọ ikoko ti o dara julọ

source_string: Destroy a Ghast with a fireball
translation: Pa Ghast pẹlu bọọlu ina kan
Lo "@a" lati fojusi gbogbo awọn oṣere
Lo "@p" lati fojusi ẹrọ orin ti o sunmọ julọ

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Gbọdọ jẹ oṣere opped ni ipo ẹda

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Awọn bulọọki pipaṣẹ ko ṣiṣẹ lori olupin yii
Lo "@r" lati fojusi ẹrọ orin laileto
Lo "@s" lati fojusi nkan ti n ṣiṣẹ

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Išọra! Lẹhin ti o ba wọle si iwe, iwọ kii yoo ni anfani lati ṣatunkọ rẹ.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ ṣii aaye ayelujara yii?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Ṣe o fẹ ṣii ọna asopọ yii tabi daakọ si apẹrẹ igbasilẹ rẹ?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Ma ṣe ṣi awọn asopọ lati awọn eniyan ti iwọ ko gbẹkẹle!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Adirẹsi IP ti ko wulo tabi ẹrọ orin aimọ

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Aṣa bossbar %s ko ni awọn oṣere lọwọlọwọ lori ayelujara

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d

translation: Ko si ohun amorindun ti a ti cloned

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Ko si ohun ti o yipada. Ẹrọ orin kii ṣe oniṣẹ ẹrọ kan
Ṣe %s ko si oniṣẹ olupin mọ
Ko si awọn bulọọki ti o kun

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: %s to sunmọ wa ni %s ( %s awọn bulọọki kuro)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: %s to sunmọ wa ni %s ( %s awọn bulọọki kuro)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Ko si ohun ti o yipada. Ẹrọ orin tẹlẹ jẹ oniṣẹ ẹrọ kan

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.

translation: Ti o ti fipamọ awọn ere

source_string: There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard
translation: Ko si awọn nkan ti o tọpinpin
Ṣeto aaye spawn si %s, %s, %s [%s] ni %s fun %s

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Afojusun boya ti ni aami naa tẹlẹ tabi ni awọn aami pupọ pupọ

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Failed to connect to the server
translation: Ti kùnà lati sopọ si olupin naa
Eyi yoo ṣe igbasilẹ rẹ ti isiyi
eto ati pe a ko le pa.
Awọn Eto To ti ni ilọsiwaju (Awọn olumulo Awọn Oludari nikan!)
Awọn Atokun Ilọsiwaju Diẹ (Awọn Olumulo Oṣiṣẹ nikan!)

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Nga ana tjetër, këtu kemi disa që kemi bërë më herët!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Fẹ lati pin tito tẹlẹ rẹ pẹlu ẹnikan? Lo apoti ti o wa ni isalẹ!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: %1$s ti jẹ papọ nipasẹ kokoro ti o ṣubu

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s wọ inu cactus lakoko ti o n gbiyanju lati sa fun %2$s
%1$s rì lakoko ti o n gbiyanju lati sa %2$s

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block
translation: %1$s ti jẹ papọ nipasẹ bulọọki ja bo
Ti fi ina kun ina %1$s nipasẹ %2$s
Ti fi ina kun ina %1$s nipasẹ %2$s lilo %3$s
%1$s rin sinu ina lakoko ti o n ja %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s gbiyanju lati wẹ ninu lava lati sa fun %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s si agaran lakoko ti o n ja %2$s
Ti pa %1$s ni igbiyanju lati ṣe ipalara %2$s
Ẹrọ orin %1$s ti gun nipasẹ orin %2$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
translation: %1$s ti fọn nipasẹ stalactite ja bo
%1$s ti kan mọgi lori stalagmite kan
%1$s ti ni ijakule lati ṣubu nipasẹ %2$s

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s ni ijakule lati ṣubu nipasẹ %2$s nipa lilo %3$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s ṣubu ti o jinna o si pari nipa %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s ṣubu ti o jinna o si pari nipa %2$s nipa lilo %3$s
%1$s ms ti ni ijakule lati ṣubu

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ dawọ duro?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Yi demo yoo ṣiṣe ni ọjọ marun ọjọ. Ṣe ohun ti o dara julọ!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: O ti kọja ọjọ karun rẹ. Lo %s lati fipamọ sikirinifoto ti ẹda rẹ.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Ṣe demo yii yoo ṣiṣe ni awọn ọjọ 5 in-game (nipa wakati 1 ati iṣẹju 40 ti akoko gidi). Ṣayẹwo awọn ilọsiwaju fun awọn tanilolobo! Gba dun!
Lo bọtini %1$s lati ṣii oja rẹ

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Lo awọn %1$s,%2$s,%3$s,%4$s awọn bọtini ati awọn Asin lati gbe ni ayika

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Akoko demo ti pari. Ra ere lati tẹsiwaju tabi bẹrẹ agbaye tuntun!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ lati ṣii iṣoro ti aye yii? Eyi yoo ṣeto aye yii lati ma jẹ %1$s nigbagbogbo, ati pe iwọ kii yoo ni anfani lati yi pada lẹẹkansi.

source_string: You were kicked from the game

translation: Igba aiyipada (Gbiyanju tun bẹrẹ iṣẹ rẹ ati oluṣeto)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: "Awọn olupin ìfàṣẹsí ko ṣe de ọdọ lọwọlọwọ. Jọwọ gbiyanju agai".
